ps-1.value: Music schools and independent teachers lack affordable, modern management software for scheduling, assignments, messaging, and billing.

ps-2.value: Independent music teachers, small music schools, and studio owners managing 10-100+ students

ps-4.value: Google Calendar + Venmo + text messages, or expensive legacy tools like My Music Staff and Jackrabbit Music

vp-1.value: An affordable, modern SaaS for music schools — scheduling, student management, assignments, messaging, and billing in one clean interface.

vp-2.value: Not a music learning app, not a practice tracker, not a marketplace for finding teachers

vp-3.value: The go-to management platform for independent music teachers and small schools, replacing spreadsheets and legacy software

cl-1.value: My Music Staff (dated UI, expensive), Jackrabbit Music (enterprise-focused, overkill for small studios), Opus1 (limited features), Teachworks (generic, not music-specific), Pembee (UK-focused)

cl-2.value: Modern UI, music-specific features (band management, assignments with audio), affordable tiered pricing ($19-99/mo), built for small studios not enterprises

cl-3.value: Dated interfaces, too expensive for solo teachers, missing music-specific features like band management and assignment tracking

vr-1.value: Personal experience as a music parent (Henry and Evelyn's lessons with teacher Greg), firsthand knowledge of scheduling pain and communication gaps

vr-2.value: Scheduling is manual and error-prone, assignment tracking is nonexistent, parent communication relies on text messages

vr-3.value: If Greg (the teacher) would switch from his current workflow, the value prop is validated

sd-1.value: Teacher dashboard, student roster, scheduling/booking, assignments, messaging, band management, parent portal, billing, admin dashboard, reports, student profiles with practice tracking

sd-3.value: Teacher dashboard with schedule and student roster, lesson booking, assignment creation, messaging between teacher/student/parent

sd-4.value: Practice tracking analytics, audio/video assignment submissions, marketplace for finding teachers, advanced financial reporting

rc-2.value: Solo: $19/mo (1 teacher, 30 students), Studio: $49/mo (5 teachers, 100 students), School: $99/mo (unlimited)

rc-4.value: Supabase (sharing Heavy Tabs project for now, will get own project): ~$25/mo, Vercel: free tier. Total burn: ~$25/mo

us-1.value: Detailed personas and stories in personas-and-stories.md — Teacher (Greg), Students (Henry, Evelyn), Parent (Keith), Admin (Phil) with role-specific stories

us-2.value: Acceptance criteria defined per persona role in personas-and-stories.md

ux-1.value: Teacher: Dashboard, Profile, Schedule, Students, Bands, Assignments, Messaging. Student: Dashboard, Profile, Book Lesson, Assignments, Messaging. Parent: Dashboard, Book Lesson, Billing, Messaging. Admin: Dashboard, Reports (gaps in admin screens).

ux-2.value: Role-based onboarding — teacher sets up profile and roster, students/parents get invite links

ux-3.value: Teacher creates assignments and manages schedule, students view and complete assignments, parents book and pay

ux-4.value: Empty states for new accounts, missing admin screens identified as gaps

vd-1.value: Tailwind CSS v4 with HDS token sync via extract-hds-tokens.mjs script

vd-2.value: Dark theme with HDS tokens synced at build time

vd-3.value: Role-specific dashboards, schedule views, roster tables, assignment cards, messaging interface (prototype.html)

si-1.value: Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, Supabase SSR

si-2.value: Tailwind CSS v4 with HDS token sync

si-4.value: Supabase URL and anon key in .env.local

si-5.value: Next.js 16 for latest App Router features, Supabase SSR for server-side auth, Tailwind for rapid prototyping

da-1.value: Users (teachers/students/parents/admins), lessons, assignments, bands, band_members, messages, billing records

da-2.value: Supabase (Postgres + Auth + RLS), sharing Heavy Tabs project temporarily, will get dedicated project

da-3.value: Supabase client with SSR helpers, RLS policies per role

aa-2.value: Supabase Auth with role-based access (teacher, student, parent, admin)

aa-3.value: Teacher (manage students, create assignments, schedule), Student (view assignments, book lessons, message), Parent (book lessons, pay, message), Admin (full access, reports)
